title: Dutch-Style Myeolchi Pilaf
description: A flavorful Korean-inspired dish with mustardy twist, made with myeolchi, pilaf, and dutch influence.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add myeolchi and stir-fry until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add pilaf rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add water, dutch mustard, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and garnish with chopped green onions.
Season with additional dutch mustard to taste.
